law: You can use the FSKit framework to implement any kind of file system, whether based on an existing storage device or as an abstraction of the contents of a URL.
To use the sample file system, do the following: Build and run the project in Xcode.
In Terminal, use the command to create a directory to serve as the mount target for the passthrough file system.
In Terminal, use the command to mount an arbitrary directory as the source for the passthrough file system.
The sample code project already contains these items; you don’t need to create a new target.
With this type, the can implement its required method to set up a as follows: Verify that the source resource is an and that the extension can access it as a security-scoped resource by calling .
The implementation of the required is similar.
Your own implementation is free to implement whichever volume operation protocols you need for your purposes, as long as you implmement the required protocol.
You can omit any operation protocols you don’t need.
